root.sql: select op_date , count(1) , sum(add_loan) , loan_type , (case when loan_type = '03' then 'เงินกู้ฉุกเฉิน Mobile' when loan_type = '42' then 'เงินกู้สามัญใช้หุ้นเป็นหลักประกันเงินกู้ Mobile' end )as loan_type_des , '!year_1!' +543 as req_year , pka_com_function.fp_get_month_name(('!month_1!')::int,'LT') as req_month_name from view_rep_paid_mobile where loan_type in ('03','42') --and op_date between '01/06/2023' and '30/06/2023' /*WHERE*/ and ((to_char(op_date ,'yyyy'))::numeric) = '!year_1!' and ((to_char(op_date,'mm'))::numeric) = '!month_1!' group by op_date , loan_type order by op_date
